creator: wolfgang@lyxys.ka.sub.org
text:
I can live with the DEFAULT_VERSIONS, but there are two things I dislike about it:
- looking at "pkg info" output for a package it is easy to see which options had been set, looking at the linked libs to determine if its a x11 or nox11 version is more difficult
- poudriere automatically picks up if port options have been changed and rebuilds those packages, however changed DEFAULT_VERSIONS in make.conf are not picked up automatically
But as I said, I can live with it for my use cases.
